items.title: Jira API integration broken
items.summary: JIRA API returns 0 results for all queries. Cameron confirmed it's not working for him either. search/jql endpoint migrated but empty results. Needs investigation.

items.title: Cameron burnout & ticket clarity
items.summary: Cameron needs clearer definitions and attainable goals per ticket. Working on being more present. Scope creep should generate new tickets for billing clarity. Small wins over endless tickets.

items.title: AlphaClaw adoption & prompts for Cameron
items.summary: Cameron starting to use AlphaClaw for Asano classification and other tasks. Needs better front-end/prompts setup. Wants Ideas app for capturing thoughts instead of ad-hoc building.

items.title: Scope creep ticket management process
items.summary: Adam asked Krista to create new tickets when clients add scope. Separate tickets for billing visibility and to show progress (5 completed tickets vs 1 endless ticket).

items.title: 14 PRs needing Adam's review
items.summary: Weekly PR triage found 65 open PRs across 14 repos. 14 need Adam's review including 5 from Cameron (IAS security, UIE templates, WoW rich text). ~45 dependabot bumps piling up.

items.title: Google OAuth token expired
items.summary: Lead research cron skipped due to Google OAuth 401. Can't pull calendar events. Needs token refresh.
